---
title: "Student Dashboard"
subtitle: "Data Insights from Supabase"
author: "Miranda Insights LLC"
date: "'March 30th, 2026'"
format: 
  html:
    self-contained: true
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  error: true
jupyter: python3
---

```{python, include=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
# ─── IMPORT REQUIRED PACKAGES ──────────────────────────────
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import plotly.express as px
import plotly.graph_objects as go

# Load your main.py data
from main import students_df, attendance_df, assessments_df, schools_df

print("✅ Data Loaded from Supabase")
print(f"Students: {students_df.shape}, Attendance: {attendance_df.shape}, Assessments: {assessments_df.shape}, Schools: {schools_df.shape}")
```

-   [Overview](#overview)
-   [Student Distribution](#student-distribution)
-   [Attendance Analysis](#attendance-analysis)
-   [Assessment Analysis](#assessment-analysis)
-   [School Comparison](#school-comparison)
-   [Interactive Box Plots](#interactive-box-plots)
-   [Correlation Analysis](#correlation-analysis)

## Overview {#overview}

```{python}
#| label: Quick summary of student data
# Summary of student data
students_summary = students_df.describe(include='all').transpose()
display(students_summary)

# Unique counts
print(f"Unique Schools: {students_df['school_id'].nunique()}")
print(f"Total Students: {len(students_df)}")
print(f"Grades: {students_df['grade_level'].unique()}")
```

## Student Distribution {#student-distribution}
```{python}
#| label: Student distribution by grade
# Student count by grade and gender
grade_counts = students_df.groupby('grade_level').size().reset_index(name='count')
fig_grade = px.bar(
    grade_counts,
    x='grade_level',
    y='count',
    title="Student Distribution by Grade",
    labels={'count':'Number of Students', 'grade_level':'Grade'},
    text='count'
)
fig_grade.show()

```

## Attendance Analysis {#attendance-analysis}
```{python}
#| label: Attendance analysis by grade
# Merge students with attendance data
attendance_merged = attendance_df.merge(students_df, on='student_id', how='left')
attendance_merged['absent_flag'] = attendance_merged['status'].apply(lambda x: 1 if x.lower()=='absent' else 0)
attendance_merged['tardy_flag'] = attendance_merged['status'].apply(lambda x: 1 if x.lower()=='tardy' else 0)

attendance_summary = attendance_merged.groupby(['grade_level','school_id']).agg(
    total_absent=('absent_flag','sum'),
    total_tardy=('tardy_flag','sum'),
    total_days=('status','count')
).reset_index()
attendance_summary = attendance_summary.merge(schools_df, on='school_id', how='left')

fig_attendance = go.Figure()
for school in attendance_summary['school_name'].unique():
    df_school = attendance_summary[attendance_summary['school_name']==school]
    fig_attendance.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_school['grade_level'], y=df_school['total_absent'], name=f'{school} Absent'))
    fig_attendance.add_trace(go.Bar(x=df_school['grade_level'], y=df_school['total_tardy'], name=f'{school} Tardy'))

fig_attendance.update_layout(
    title="Attendance Summary by Grade & School",
    barmode='group', xaxis_title='Grade', yaxis_title='Days'
)
fig_attendance.show()

```


## Assessment Analysis {#assessment-analysis}
```{python}
#| label: Assessment analysis by grade and subject
# Merge assessments + students
assessment_merged = assessments_df.merge(students_df, on='student_id', how='left')

# Average scores by grade and subject
assessment_summary = assessment_merged.groupby(['grade_level','subject'])['score'].mean().reset_index()

fig_scores = px.bar(
    assessment_summary,
    x='grade_level',
    y='score',
    color='subject',∏
    barmode='group',
    title="Average Assessment Scores by Grade and Subject",
    labels={'grade_level':'Grade', 'score':'Average Score'}
)
fig_scores.show()
```

## School Comparison {#school-comparison}
```{python}
#| label: Average assessment scores by school
# Merge assessments with school info
school_summary = assessment_merged.groupby('school_name')['score'].mean().reset_index()
fig_school = px.bar(
    school_summary,
    x='school_name',
    y='score',
    title="Average Assessment Score by School",
    labels={'score':'Average Score', 'school_name':'School'}
)
fig_school.update_layout(xaxis_tickangle=-45)
fig_school.show()
```

## Interactive Box Plots {#interactive-box-plots}
```{python}
for col_split in ['ell_status', 'special_ed_flag']:
    fig_box = px.box(
        assessment_merged,
        x='grade_level',
        y='score',
        color='score',
        color_continuous_scale='RdYlGn',
        facet_col='school_name',
        points='all',
        hover_data=['student_id','subject',col_split],
        category_orders={"grade_level": sorted(assessment_merged['grade_level'].unique())}
    )
    fig_box.update_layout(title=f"Assessment Scores by Grade & School, Split by {col_split}")
    fig_box.show()
```

## Correlation Analysis {#correlation-analysis}
```{python}
#| label: Correlation between attendance and assessment scores
# Encode EL and Special Ed flags for correlation
assessment_merged['ell_flag'] = assessment_merged['ell_status'].apply(lambda x: 1 if x=='Yes' else 0)
assessment_merged['sped_flag'] = assessment_merged['special_ed_flag'].apply(lambda x: 1 if x=='Yes' else 0)

corr_df = assessment_merged[['score','ell_flag','sped_flag','grade_level']]
corr_df['grade_level'] = pd.to_numeric(corr_df['grade_level'])
corr = corr_df.corr()

fig_corr = px.imshow(
    corr,
    text_auto=True,
    color_continuous_scale='RdYlGn',
    title="Correlation Heatmap: Score, EL, Special Ed, Grade"
)
fig_corr.show()
```
